mapper.select:
select id, content, analysis from core.exercise_generator_source where type = lower(#{structureType})
and topic like '%' || #{topic} || '%'
and ( select count(*) from
jsonb_array_elements(analysis->'sentences') as sentence, jsonb_array_elements(sentence->'words') with ordinality as word(word, word_index)
jsonb_array_elements(analysis->'words') with ordinality as word(word, word_index)
where word->>'upos' = 'VERB' and word->'feats' @> '["VerbForm=Inf"]'::jsonb or (word->'feats' @> '["VerbForm=Sup"]'::jsonb and word->'feats' @> '["Case=Ill"]'::jsonb)
where word->>'upos' = 'NOUN' and (word->>'deprel' = 'obj' or word->>'deprel' = 'obl') and (word->'feats' @> '["Case=Nom"]'::jsonb or word->'feats' @> '["Case=Gen"]'::jsonb or word->'feats' @> '["Case=Par"]'::jsonb)
where word->>'upos' = 'ADJ' and word->>'deprel' = 'amod' -- WITH ORDINALITY is 1-based for current row; JSON array access is 0-based, -- so word_index points to the next token (current would be word_index - 1).
and (sentence->'words')->(word_index::int)->>'upos' = 'NOUN'
and (analysis->'words')->(word_index::int)->>'upos' = 'NOUN'
) >=
5 1
order by random()
